name: dark-matter-replicators-space-age
title: Dark Matter Replicators Space Age
author: Honktown, Nihilistzsche, Jaer985
description: Adds replicators that produce items using electricity and Dark Matter. Features dynamic recipe generation, specialized planetary replicators, individual technology research trees for every item, de-replication recycling, and customizable balancing calculations. Fully optimized for high UPS.
